description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet with a light wood grain finish on the top and sides, and smooth, matte white doors and drawer fronts. The cabinet features two tall doors on the front, likely concealing shelves or compartments inside, and a single drawer above the doors, each with small, round keyholes or lock mechanisms. The sides and top display a consistent wood texture, while the front contrasts with a clean, minimalist white surface. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its design is functional and contemporary, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment entryways. The absence of visible handles suggests a push-to-open mechanism or integrated pulls.
description: A modern, light wood and white cabinet with two tall doors and a single upper drawer, featuring a minimalist design and small lock mechanisms. The cabinet is freestanding and has a clean, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two tall white doors and a light wood top, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing a single upper drawer and two doors, each with small round keyholes.
description_view_3: Right side view with the same light wood grain texture as the left side.
